questions.question: Describe the main difference between supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms, as discussed in Chapter 39. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of labels in supervised learning

questions.question: What is the purpose of normalization in exploratory data analysis, and how does it relate to scikit-learn's StandardScaler? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the effect of normalization on feature scales

questions.question: Choose a relevant technique from Chapter 39 for handling missing values in a dataset. Explain how the technique works and its advantages. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the trade-offs between different missing value imputation techniques
